name: tailscale-control
title: Tailscale Control
description: Control and inspect your local Tailscale node from Raycast.
author: acxtrila

preferences.name: tailscalePath
preferences.title: Tailscale Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the tailscale CLI binary. Leave blank to use PATH lookup.

preferences.name: refreshIntervalSeconds
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often the dashboard refreshes automatically.

preferences.name: showOfflinePeers
preferences.title: Peers
preferences.label: Show offline peers
preferences.description: Include offline devices in the peer list.

commands.name: tailscale
commands.title: Tailscale Control
commands.description: Inspect peers, health, and local Tailscale controls.
